Demand Forecast AI
Model trained on 24 months of sales history
Forecasted Demand (90d)
AED 1.84M
↑ 14% vs prior quarter
Forecast Confidence
86%
Model accuracy (MAPE 14%)
Top Growth Category
Safety PPE
↑ 22% projected
Demand Spikes Flagged
3
Seasonal — review stock
AI Forecast Insight
Safety PPE demand is projected to rise 22% over the next quarter, driven by 3 large O&G projects entering execution phase. Recommend pre-positioning stock on safety helmets and coveralls before the Q3 surge. Compressor demand stays flat.
Demand Forecast vs Actuals (12-month + 3-month projection)

Total Points

Points Value

Grand Total
Incentive Rules & Configuration
Point Conversion (₹ per Point)
Define tiered ₹ value per incentive point based on total points earned
From (pts) To (pts) ₹ per Point
Leave "To" blank for the last slab (unlimited). Example: 1–10 pts → ₹15/pt, 11–50 pts → ₹79/pt, 51+ → ₹150/pt
Activity Types
Define all activity types — Service, Sales, Installation, Maintenance, or any custom type
Product Point Rates
Each product gets its own point rate per activity type
Travel Allowance Rules
Define dynamic travel rules based on KM, days, and months
Travel KM Amount (₹) Type Value
Target Achievement Rules
Define dynamic bonuses based on target achievement percentage
Target % Threshold Bonus Amount (₹)
Service Call Conversion Rules
Define dynamic bonuses based on service-to-sale/AMC conversion rates
Conversion % Threshold Bonus Amount (₹)
Bonus Rules
Incentive Breakdown
Quantity Tier Rules
Progressive slab: points calculate per slab — 8 units with tiers [1–5: 1.5pt, 6–10: 2pt] = (5 × 1.5) + (3 × 2.0) = 13.5 pts
FROM qty
TO qty
Pts / Unit

Auto-Assignment Rules
Define rules to auto-suggest SEs when assigning visits
How it works: When you assign a visit, AIMS IQ checks these rules against the customer's territory and sector and auto-suggests the right SE — removing manual coordination.
Active Rules
Territory: Mumbai + Sector: Oil & Gas
→ Ravi Kumar
Active
Territory: Pune + Sector: Any
→ Priya Singh
Active
Budget: Over ₹50L → Senior SE only
→ Ravi Kumar
Active

→ Kavya Nair

AI Suggestions Powered by AIMS AI
Upsell Opportunity 91% match
Siemens 150A Circuit Breaker (Upgrade) TATA Steel bought 200 units of 100A breakers in Jun 2024. Plant capacity review typically happens every 6 months — upgraded 150A model handles 50% higher load. Avg. order size: ₹38L.
Cross-sell Opportunity 76% match
Honeywell Safety Harness (Full Body) Customers in heavy manufacturing with 100+ employees buying goggles typically add fall protection within 4 months. 6 similar accounts converted — avg. add-on ₹8.4L.
Visit Tip: TATA Steel's Q3 CAPEX budget opens next month — lead with ROI data on the 150A breaker upgrade. Purchase Head Suresh Mehta responds well to cost-per-unit comparisons, not feature sheets.
